3092510.name: Godly Visage
3092510.description:
In this adventure, you'll play as Godly, the youngest of three brothers, traveling through a devastated world, traversing enormous castles and cities, getting lost in the world's nooks and crannies, exploring, and finding valuable items to sell.

Upgrade your character for the challenge that awaits you around every corner. Meet new characters who will help and accompany you along the way.

Discover the mysteries hidden in grand gates and immense environments. Challenge legendary enemies infected by a divine disease that you must defeat.

Game Features:

2D side-scrolling game.

Controls tailored for both keyboard and mouse, as well as for gamepads.

Discover various abilities in true Metroidvania style.

Traditional frame-by-frame animation and design.

Discover colorful and interesting characters you encounter along the way.

Challenge enemies and fearsome bosses.

Collect lost notes to unravel more of this mysterious world.
3092510.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
